# Spec: fixture-sample (verify-tools test fixture)

## Purpose

Fixture with spec.md and execution_plan.json but no execution_state.json,
used to exercise the degraded "no state" path (taskState must be null).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1 → R1.S1 [auto] — sample automatic criterion one.
- [ ] AC2 → R1.S2 [manual] — sample manual criterion two.
